special_mechanics.name: Real-time Combat
special_mechanics.description: Game features real-time battles with a power bar mechanic rather than turn-based combat. Power bar determines damage dealt when attacking.

special_mechanics.name: Flammie Flight
special_mechanics.description: Character can fly on Flammie, demonstrated using Mode 7 graphics effect

special_mechanics.name: Ring Command Menu System
special_mechanics.description: Circular menu system that pauses action momentarily to allow player decisions mid-battle

tier_notes: Tier 1 classified as empirical/qualitative. Available documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics, story, and development history rather than precise physics parameters. No movement speed, gravity, or sub-pixel system values documented in Data Crystal, TCRF, or Wikipedia sources.
sources_used: data_crystal - ROM specifications and game metadata
wikipedia - Gameplay mechanics and control systems
